MATISAN ENGINEERING is an import and export company dedicated to exporting high-quality products. The company is committed to enhancing agricultural offerings by working directly with farms, sourcing quality goods from local traders, and obtaining products from wholesalers and the Ethiopian Commodity Exchange (ECX). MATISAN ENGINEERING is led by an experienced business tycoon who has been involved in the export of coffee, oilseeds, pulses, cereals, and other agricultural raw materials. The founder's objective in establishing the company is to create a well-organized and coordinated business that focuses on exports and related activities.
